---
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{enumitem}
  - \setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=*}
---

# MOVING TO OPPORTUNITY
## Name: Argenis Contreras
## Email: acontrerasburgoa@hks.harvard.edu
## Date: February 20th 2026


The Moving to Opportunity (MTO) Experiment


```{r, include = FALSE}
### Set up
options(scipen = 999) # optional, ensures numbers aren't reported in scientific notation
library(haven)     # read_dta
library(dplyr)     # data wrangling
library(ggplot2)   # plots
library(lmtest)    # coeftest
library(sandwich)  # robust vcovHC
library(scales)
```

```{r load_data}
DATA_PATH <- "mto.dta"
if (!file.exists(DATA_PATH)) stop("Place mto.dta next to this file or update DATA_PATH.")
mto <- read_dta(DATA_PATH)
```

```{r}
mto %>% # this pipe creates a variable with voucher as the main filter, then dividing those who moved who received a voucher and those who didnt move even though they received a voucher.
  group_by(voucher) %>%
  summarise(
    frac_moved_yes = mean(moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    frac_moved_no  = 1 - mean(moved == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )
```

```{r}
# Kessler score report
mto %>%
  group_by(voucher) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_kessler = mean(kessler, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n()
  )
```

```{r}
#regression on kessler
kess_reg <- lm(kessler ~ voucher, data = mto)
lmtest::coeftest(kess_reg, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(kess_reg, type = "HC2"))
```

```{r}
#regression on moved
move_reg <- lm(moved ~ voucher, data = mto)
lmtest::coeftest(move_reg, vcov = sandwich::vcovHC(move_reg, type = "HC2"))
```

```{r}
#coefficients
ITT_y <- coef(kess_reg)["voucher"]
ITT_d <- coef(move_reg)["voucher"]

TOT <- ITT_y/ITT_d
cat("The Treatment-on-the treated (TOT) effect is the ratio between the ITT and the Compliance Rate:", round(TOT,3))
```

```{r fig_moved_ci, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
df_moved <- mto %>%
  mutate(Group = if_else(voucher == 1, "Voucher offer", "Control")) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(moved, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sqrt(mean * (1 - mean) / n),              # SE of a proportion
    lo = pmax(0, mean - 1.96 * se),
    hi = pmin(1, mean + 1.96 * se),
    label = percent(mean, accuracy = 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(df_moved, aes(x = Group, y = mean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), width = 0.15) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.6, size = 4) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Fraction moved",
       title = "Compliance (First Stage): Moving by Random Assignment (95% CI)") +
  theme_bw()
```


```{r fig_kessler_ci, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

df_kess <- mto %>%
  mutate(Group = if_else(voucher == 1, "Voucher offer", "Control")) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarize(
    n = sum(!is.na(kessler)),
    mean = mean(kessler, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(kessler, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    lo = mean - 1.96 * se,
    hi = mean + 1.96 * se,
    label = round(mean, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(df_kess, aes(x = Group, y = mean)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), width = 0.15) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.6, size = 4) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean Kessler score",
    title = "Outcome (ITT): Mean Kessler by Random Assignment (95% CI)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
